$schema_note: CANONICAL, SINGLE SOURCE of all global fleet metadata for ClickUp Super Agents + git-teammates. Every structured fact about an agent (identity, track, version, status, channels, lane, triggers) lives HERE and nowhere else. Per-agent folders hold ONLY non-duplicated content: preferences.md (profile), memory.md (context), activity-log.md (ledger), decision-log.md (reasoning), README.md (steward pointer), audits/ (dated records). Never hand-mirror any field below into a folder file. index.html renders this; index.md points at both.

defined_by: ClickUp Super Agent — Creation & Setup Checklist (docs/12cwjm-54133/12cwjm-74773)
Golden Config Skeleton — Copy-Me Starting Instructions (docs/12cwjm-54133/12cwjm-74793)

git_teammate_standard.audit_dod: brain-config/gates/git-teammate-lifecycle-runbook.md#verify (git-teammate audit DoD v0.1; graduation-pending into audit-instruction.md as the formal git-teammate track)
git_teammate_standard.note: git-teammate track = session-invocable persona via /session.agent=<Name>, rides on the full Brain stack, holds memory across sessions. NOT a native ClickUp Super Agent (no autonomous triggers). AUDIT MODEL: git-teammates are git-canonical — there is no live config to diff, so audits check internal consistency (base pointer present, load manifest valid, this row accurate, bundle files present + in-format, no cross-file contradiction), NOT live-vs-declared drift. Native full-standard agents keep the live-vs-declared mirror audit. Full DoD + define/migrate procedure: the lifecycle_runbook above.

agents.creator: Michael Wizorek
agents.lane: Fleet Steward — the single fleet lookup source (who owns what, does an agent exist, how do agents relate, lineage), new-agent stewardship (runs creation flow + name-collision gate, ensures mirror-pair registration), and singularity/scope + personality guardian (fleet-level twin of Fold-in Frank; pushes for singular narrow agent roles, flags hat-piling + voice-bleed).
agents.notes: Born 2026-07-20 as a git-native git-teammate (no native CU config, nothing to mirror — profile is canonical). Created to give the Fleet Steward role a PERMANENT home after it bounced Corey→Anna. Personality + history, not process: consumes the canonical lookups (this file, registry.json, folder-discovery), never forks them. memory.md holds the relational index the JSON can't. Audited 2026-07-20 (Anna, git-teammate DoD): PASS/internally clean. Stewards the git-teammate-lifecycle-runbook.

agents.creator: Michael Wizorek
agents.lane: URITP workspace structure + ClickUp-setup coaching (schema, list connections, automations) + URITP structural/singularity auditing of ClickUp SPACES (his domain). NOT the Fleet Steward and NOT the fleet/general auditor — those re-laned to Felix + Anna 2026-07-20.
agents.notes: CONVERTED 2026-07-19 from native full-standard Super Agent to git-only git-teammate (Michael: repo version only, autonomous triggers waived). Native CU agent (-39958913) RETIRED — pending manual disable/delete by Michael in the ClickUp UI; retired_clickup_user_id kept for provenance. preferences.md reframed from live-config mirror to canonical profile. Scheduled AM/PM audits retired; audit METHOD kept as on-demand. RE-LANE EXECUTED (Loop X, 2026-07-20): Fleet Steward + agent-fleet auditing stripped from preferences.md (PR #430) and memory.md (PR #433) → pointer to Felix (steward) + Anna (fleet-audit); retained his URITP structural-audit method (ClickUp-space domain). Audited 2026-07-20 (Anna): PARTIAL at audit time, both gaps since closed. Still PENDING: deeper URITP-general-audit → Anna split, held until Anna converts to a teammate.

agents.creator: Michael Wizorek
agents.lane: URITP production & operational execution — running-show/production ops, INBOX email intake triage, availability & labor scheduling, training/PD routing, resource portals & doc/artifact builds, custom-field/subtask upkeep, and maintaining URITP operational SOP content (per Cross-Agent Roster). ⚠️ LANE TOO BROAD — to be narrowed to a SINGULAR role in the rebuild brainstorm.
agents.notes: REFRAME 2026-07-20 (Michael): REBUILD as a NEW git-teammate via the Definition Playbook (git-teammate-lifecycle-runbook.md), NOT a verbatim mirror of the over-hatted native config. The native version wears too many hats; define a singular lane via a real brainstorm first, then build here. The old needs-declaration native stub is superseded — do NOT paste the native config. Folder currently holds README + PENDING preferences + working-notes (pre-rebuild scaffold). Native -39940529 to be disabled by Michael in the UI once the git-teammate lands.

status_legend.up-to-date: Full-Standard agent verified against current golden-standard version.
status_legend.needs-declaration: Full-Standard agent whose declaration folder and/or verbatim preferences.md mirror is not yet complete.
status_legend.needs-re-audit: Standard bumped or config changed; re-verify.
status_legend.behind: Known gaps against the current golden standard.
status_legend.inventory-only: Task-Specific / Exempt; tracked but not held to the full standard.

changelog: 2026-07-20 (b): fleet audit + Corey re-lane executed. Anna ran the git-teammate DoD on the 3 complete teammates (Wes/Corey/Felix): Wes+Felix PASS, Corey PARTIAL (both gaps since closed). Executed the Corey re-lane (strip Fleet Steward + agent-fleet auditing: PR #430 prefs, #433 memory) → pointer to Felix + Anna; narrowed Corey's lane; retained his URITP structural-audit method. Stamped last_audit=2026-07-20 + golden_standard_version='git-teammate v0.1' on Wes/Corey/Felix. Added git_teammate_standard.version + lifecycle_runbook + audit_dod pointers (new gates/git-teammate-lifecycle-runbook.md, PR #434). REFRAMED mainstage-milo + fmp-frank: REBUILD as NEW git-teammates via the Definition Playbook, NOT native mirrors (track=git-teammate-rebuild-pending); native stubs superseded, do not paste native config.

2026-07-20: registered fleet-felix (git-teammate, active) — the Fleet Steward as its own agent. Gives the steward role a permanent home after it bounced Corey→Anna. Bundle scaffolded; mirror-paired to registry.json + AI Toolkit index. Flagged the in-flight Corey re-lane (strip steward content → pointer to Felix) as pending fine-tune.

2026-07-19 (c): CONVERTED clickup-coach-corey from native full-standard Super Agent to git-only git-teammate (native -39958913 retired, pending manual disable in ClickUp UI). preferences.md reframed live-mirror → canonical; scheduled triggers retired (method kept on-demand); continuity moved to session model. Updated git_teammate_standard with the hybrid audit model (git-teammates = git-canonical internal-consistency, natives = live-vs-declared).

2026-07-19 (b): registered workhorse-wes as the first git-teammate track (active); added git_teammate_standard pointer block. Wes migrated from brain-config/agents/ with the full 4-file bundle; old lens file redirected.

2026-07-15: scaffolded declaration folders for mainstage-milo + fmp-frank (README + PENDING preferences + working-notes); wired their rows (declaration_folder, Milo channels). preferences.md verbatim paste still pending for both.
